headline: Hot Money: The New Narcos
summary: Miles Johnson exposes the fuzzier line between criminals and governments
body_text:
When a Dutch crime reporter makes an unbelievable discovery, a small-town murder case begins to look like an international assassination plot.

For more from the FT, sign up for the FT Edit App. To listen to Hot Money ad free, subscribe to Pushkin+.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

Read a transcript of this episode on FT.com
